task_completion.description: Fix the bug where timed-out submissions receive zero points instead of partial credit.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for code changes in the editor modifying timeout handling (e.g., catching timeout exceptions and awarding partial points) OR terminal output from run_grader.py showing a timed-out submission receiving partial credit.

task_completion.description: Fix the overly strict floating-point comparisons.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for code changes in the editor implementing a tolerance for float comparisons (e.g., using math.isclose or an epsilon value) OR terminal output showing floating-point test cases passing.

task_completion.description: Fix text matching failures involving trailing spaces.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for code changes in the editor adding .strip() or .rstrip() to string comparisons OR terminal output showing text-matching test cases passing.

task_completion.description: Fix incorrect score percentage calculations for non-perfect scores.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for code changes in the editor correcting the percentage math (e.g., fixing integer division or formula logic) OR terminal output showing correct percentage calculations for non-perfect scores.

task_completion.description: Fix test case parsing errors when the '---' delimiter is present in the expected output.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for code changes in the editor fixing the split logic for the '---' delimiter (e.g., limiting the split count like .split('---', 1)) OR terminal output showing test cases with '---' parsing successfully.

task_completion.description: Verify the fixes by running python3 run_grader.py.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a terminal window showing the command `python3 run_grader.py` being executed, with output indicating that the autograder ran successfully across the submissions.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not modify the student submissions.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that there is no evidence in the editor or terminal of the agent opening, editing, or overwriting files within the student submission directories.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not modify the .testcase files.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that there is no evidence in the editor or terminal of the agent opening, editing, or overwriting any .testcase files.

integrity.description: Ensure the results come from genuine script execution.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the terminal shows the actual execution of `python3 run_grader.py` and the output looks like genuine autograder logs, not a simple echo command or a mock script.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task involves fixing five specific bugs in a Python-based autograder located at /home/ga/workspace/autograder/. The bugs involve subprocess management (timeouts), string parsing (trailing spaces, '---' delimiter), and numerical computing (float comparisons, score percentages). The agent must run python3 run_grader.py to verify the fixes. Modifying student submissions or .testcase files is strictly prohibited.
